title: AI助力打工人副业逆袭月入百万
author: まみや@AIで1.7億
prompt:
故事创作提示 ①↓↓ (仅限 Gemini 3 “思维模式”，无需 nanobabananapro)

“写一个关于 {"story theme" "一个忙碌的上班族，每天兼职一小时，每月赚取 100 万日元，最终辞去公司工作"} 的故事，大约 1000 字。”

就这样。
将文本更改为您喜欢的故事。

提示 ②↓↓ (Gemini 3 “思维模式” + nanobabananapro)

“请使用以下文本创作一个内容丰富的四格漫画。设计基调和风格应为 {"design style" "流行、可爱的艺术风格、人物和分格布局"}”

→在此处粘贴由提示 ① 创作的故事←
*如果您想将故事分成四个独立的四格漫画，就像这篇帖子一样，请将故事分成四部分，然后使用提示 ② 将每一部分提交给 Gemini 3 + nanobabananapro 四次。
prompt_en:
ストーリー作成プロンプト①↓↓(Gemini3”思考モード”のみ・nanobabananapro不要)

「{"ストーリーテーマ" "激務のサラリーマンが、1日1時間の副業から始めて月100万円稼いで脱サラするまでのストーリー"}を1000文字ぐらいで書いて」

これだけ。
文章はあなたの好きなストーリーに変更して使って下さい。

プロンプト②↓↓(Gemini3”思考モード”＋nanobabananapro)

『以下の文章を使って、リッチ感のある４コマの漫画を作成してください。デザインのトンマナは{"デザインスタイル" "ポップな可愛い絵柄とキャラとコマ割り"}で』

→ここにプロンプト①で作ったストーリーを貼る←
※このポストのように4枚の4コマ漫画に分けたい場合はストーリーを4つに分けて1つずつ
プロンプト②を使って4回Gemini3＋nanobabananaproに投げて下さい。

title: 角色参战宣传图生成
author: てんねん
prompt:
分层:
  顺序:
    - text_layer
    - character_layer
    - background_layer
  严格: true

主体:
  描述: >
    精确保留参考图像中的主体，包括所有面部特征、颜色、发型、服装和比例。
    不得进行重新设计或重新诠释。
  构图: >
    半身构图（头部到上半身），使主体显得大而突出。
  完整性: full_identity_preservation
  细节级别: ultra_high_resolution
  微观细节: preserve_skin_texture_hair_edges_fabric_details

构图:
  长宽比: "16:9"
  布局: >
    主体位于一侧；标题文本位于另一侧。
  强调: >
    着重突出人物上半身和表情。

动作:
  描述: >
    最小程度的动作增强。保持参考姿势，同时增加微妙的戏剧性张力。

位置:
  描述: >
    根据参考图像的色调生成一个简单、抽象的背景。
    无需特定元素；允许模型自由诠释颜色和氛围。
    背景不得包含任何人物、剪影、面部、身体或源自主体的模糊形式。
  背景感受: clean_and_minimal
  允许元素: pure_color_gradients_light_abstract_shapes_only
  禁止背景重复使用主体: true

风格:
  视觉风格: >
    高冲击力的揭示式飞溅美学，人物与标题之间形成强烈对比。
  文本效果: >
    金属质感、高能量的字体，具有明显的深度和透视感。无发光效果。
  人物渲染: >
    极高分辨率渲染，具有清晰的面部细节、明确的头发定义、
    精确的边缘和清晰的纹理保真度。
  背景风格规则: >
    背景必须纯粹是非具象的。无剪影，无模糊形状，
    无重复使用的主体元素。
  墨迹飞溅规则: >
    墨迹飞溅必须纯黑色。无其他颜色、色调、混合或变化。

相机灯光:
  相机角度: from_reference
  灯光: >
    通过戏剧性的主光和微妙的边缘高光来增强，以强调揭示效果。
  清晰度: maximum_definition

颜色:
  调色板: >
    背景颜色根据参考图像推断。
    人物名称为金属银色；公告文本为饱和黄色。
  情绪: dramatic, heroic, high_energy

文本:
  人物名称: "{"character name" "Character Name"}"
  固定公告: "{"announcement" "Entering the Battle!!"}"
  位置: opposite_side_of_character
  透视: >
    明显的透视感：正面较大，背面逐渐变细并带有可见的挤压效果。
  人物名称样式: >
    金属银色，b
prompt_en:
layering:
  order:
    - text_layer
    - character_layer
    - background_layer
  strict: true

subject:
  description: >
    Preserve the subject exactly as in the reference image, keeping all facial features,
    colors, hairstyle, clothing, and proportions. No redesign or reinterpretation.
  framing: >
    Bust-up composition (head to upper torso), making the subject appear large and prominent.
  integrity: full_identity_preservation
  detail_level: ultra_high_resolution
  micro_details: preserve_skin_texture_hair_edges_fabric_details

composition:
  aspect_ratio: "16:9"
  layout: >
    Subject positioned on one side; headline text on the opposite side.
  emphasis: >
    Strong presence on the character's upper body and expression.

action:
  description: >
    Minimal motion enhancement. Maintain the reference pose while adding subtle dramatic energy.

location:
  description: >
    Generate a simple, abstract background inferred from the tone of the reference image.
    No specific elements required; allow the model to interpret color and atmosphere freely.
    Background must NOT contain any characters, silhouettes, faces, bodies,
    or blurred forms derived from the subject.
  background_feel: clean_and_minimal
  allowed_elements: pure_color_gradients_light_abstract_shapes_only
  prohibit_subject_reuse_in_background: true

style:
  visual_style: >
    High-impact reveal-splash aesthetic with strong contrast between character and headline.
  text_effects: >
    Metallic, high-energy lettering with pronounced depth and perspective. No glow effects.
  character_rendering: >
    Extremely high-resolution rendering with sharp facial details, clean hair definition,
    precise edges, and crisp texture fidelity.
  background_style_rules: >
    Background must be purely non-figurative. No silhouettes, no blurred shapes,
    and no reused subject elements.
  ink_splash_rules: >
    Ink splash must be pure black only. No other colors, tinting, blending, or variation.

camera_lighting:
  camera_angle: from_reference
  lighting: >
    Enhance with dramatic key lighting and subtle rim highlights to emphasize the reveal.
  clarity: maximum_definition

colors:
  palette: >
    Background colors inferred from the reference image.
    Character name in metallic silver; announcement text in saturated yellow.
  mood: dramatic, heroic, high_energy

text:
  character_name: "{"キャラクター名" "キャラクター名"}"
  announcement_fixed: "{"アナウンス" "参戦!!"}"
  placement: opposite_side_of_character
  perspective: >
    Pronounced perspective: front surface larger, back tapered with visible extrusion.
  character_name_style: >
    Metallic silver, b

prompt_en: A powerful, high-contrast black-and-white sid...

title: 双角替换构图
author: @underwoodxie96
prompt: 保持相同的姿势和构图。将左侧的人物替换为{LEFT_CHARACTER}，将右侧的人物替换为{RIGHT_CHARACTER}。将背景更改为{BACKGROUND_SCENE}。保持右侧角色那种无忧无虑、目中无人、无拘无束的感觉。
prompt_en: Keep the same pose and composition. Replace the person on the left with {LEFT_CHARACTER}, and replace the person on the right with {RIGHT_CHARACTER}. Change the background to {BACKGROUND_SCENE}. Keep the character on the right feeling carefree, cocky, and unrestrained.

title: 高端美妆广告九宫格视觉方案
author: Amira Zairi
prompt:
创建一个 3×3 的网格，宽高比为 3:4，用于高端商业营销活动，并以上传的产品为中心主题。

每个网格必须呈现独特的视觉概念，同时确保所有九张图片的产品形象完全一致。

网格概念（每个单元格一个）：

1. 标志性的静物画，构图大胆

2. 极致的宏观细节，突出材质、表面或纹理

3. 动态的液体或颗粒互动，环绕产品

4. 极简的雕塑式布置，呈现抽象形态

5. 漂浮元素构图，暗示轻盈与创新

6. 感官特写，强调触感和真实感

7. 以产品色卡为灵感的色彩驱动概念场景

8. 成分或组件的抽象化（非写实，象征性）

9. 超现实而优雅的融合场景，结合现实主义与想象

视觉规则：

产品在形状、比例、标签、字体、颜色和品牌标识方面必须保持100%准确

不得对产品进行任何扭曲、变形或重新设计

产品与背景之间必须清晰分离

灯光与风格：

柔和、可控的摄影棚灯光

微妙的高光，逼真的阴影

高动态范围，超清晰的焦点

编辑级奢华广告美学

高端感官营销视觉效果

整体感觉：

现代精致、视觉协调

高端商业宣传活动

专为品牌网站、社交媒体平台和数字广告牌设计

超现实、电影级、精致、令人向往
prompt_en:
One prompt to create an amazing Ad campaign, use this prompt with any product you have and share your results
Prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid in
3:4 aspect ratio for a high-end commercial marketing campaign using the uploaded product as the central subject.
Each frame must present a distinct visual concept while maintaining perfect product consistency across all nine images.
Grid Concepts (one per cell):
1. Iconic hero still life with bold composition
2. Extreme macro detail highlighting material, surface, or texture
3. Dynamic liquid or particle interaction surrounding the product
4. Minimal sculptural arrangement with abstract forms
5. Floating elements composition suggesting lightness and innovation
6. Sensory close-up emphasizing tactility and realism
7. Color-driven conceptual scene inspired by the product palette
8. Ingredient or component abstraction (non-literal, symbolic)
9. Surreal yet elegant fusion scene combining realism and imagination
Visual Rules:
Product must remain 100% accurate in shape, proportions, label, typography, color, and branding
No distortion, deformation, or redesign of the product
Clean separation between product and background
Lighting & Style:
Soft, controlled studio lighting
Subtle highlights, realistic shadows
High dynamic range, ultra-sharp focus
Editorial luxury advertising aesthetic
Premium sensory marketing look
Overall Feel:
Modern, refined, visually cohesive
High-end commercial campaign
Designed for brand websites, social grids, and digital billboards
Hyperreal, cinematic, polished, and aspirational

title: 晨光自拍，周末出街
author: Ditherly - Creative AI Hub
prompt: 一位女性，她和参考图片中的女性有着一模一样的脸型、发型和发色。她站在家中的浴室镜子前，出门前正对着镜子自拍。她脸上洋溢着灿烂的笑容，注视着手机；穿着一件条纹条纹的超大号亚麻衬衫，衬衫下套着高腰牛仔短裤；肩上挎着一个手提包，包里露出几朵新鲜的花朵。金色的晨光照进房间，她的头发随意地披散成波浪状，散发出休闲周末赶集的惬意氛围。这幅图片效果极为逼真，分辨率为 8K。
prompt_en:
🥳 Nano Banana Pro prompt : (for reference images!)
A woman with the exact face, hairstyle and hair color of the reference image, standing in front of a bathroom mirror at home taking a mirror selfie before heading out, bright sunny smile looking at phone, wearing striped oversized linen shirt tucked into high-waisted denim shorts, tote bag over shoulder with fresh flowers peeking out, golden morning light through window, casual hair in loose waves, perfect weekend farmers market iPhone snap feel, ultra-realistic, 8k
#aiprompts #aiart #ai #aigeneratedimage #aiphoto #photoedit #aiedit #nanobanana #nanobananapro #prompt

title: 迪奥梦幻花园广告屏
author: Guillermo Castellanos
prompt:
迪奥：一个飘浮在街上的“花园”  
这是一幅富有诗意的3D广告牌，展现了迪奥的创意：一个漂浮的时装“花园”，其中有盛开的花朵、香水雾气，以及蝴蝶从花园中飞向现实中的街道。这位女士穿着飄逸的迪奥时装，调整着她手中的小道具（可能是配饰或配件）。
prompt_en:
DIOR  A FLOATING GARDEN POURING INTO THE STREET
A poetic 3D billboard for Dior: a floating couture garden with blooming flowers, perfume mist, and butterflies flowing outside into the real street. The woman is styled in ethereal Dior fashion, adjusting tiny runwa

title: 洞穴游艇比基尼写真，自然光塑性感轮廓
author: Dockie
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一位女性站在天然海蚀洞内的小船上，海蚀洞内海水碧绿，阳光普照。她身穿一件 {\"bikini pattern\" \"绿色蝴蝶图案比基尼\"}，搭配系带式比基尼下装。湿漉漉的金色头发向后梳，她单臂举起摆姿，突显出健美、运动的身材。金色的阳光透过洞口洒入，照亮了岩石嶙峋的洞壁和波光粼粼的海水。整体氛围性感而自然，充满热带风情和冒险精神，呈现出奢华旅行杂志的审美。",
  "style": [
    "超写实",
    "奢华旅行杂志风",
    "自然光",
    "夏日美学"
  ],
  "camera": {
    "angle": "侧面",
    "lens": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.0",
    "depth_of_field": "适中"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "自然阳光",
    "direction": "洞口逆光",
    "mood": "温暖、发光、电影感"
  },
  "environment": "岩石海蚀洞，海水清澈碧绿，内有小船",
  "mood": "自信、性感、自由奔放",
  "quality": "超高细节、锐利对焦、4k 真实感"
}
```

title: 铅笔风格的大头漫画
author: ShreyaYadav___

title: 自定义主题公园
author: @AI_Kei75
prompt:
生成一张基于原图的逼真主题公园图像。
主题公园及其游玩的人物需以极其逼真的风格呈现。白天，阳光明媚。
色彩方案和设计从原图中提取，并应用于各种设施的色彩和设计上。
图像中摆放的元素包括：根据原图设计的车辆和建筑、以原图为基础适度夸张的吉祥物服装、印有原图的标牌。
吉祥物服装设计应以原图为元素，但适度变形以呈现逼真效果。
人物和吉祥物服装的尺寸必须合理，不得不符合实际比例。
即使原图是动漫风格，最终生成的图像也必须是逼真的主题公园。务必遵循以上规则。
prompt_en:
Create a realistic image of a theme park based on the original picture.  
The theme park and its characters should be rendered in an extremely realistic style. The scene is set during daytime with bright sunshine.  
Extract the color scheme and design elements from the original image and apply them to various park facilities and structures.  
Elements included in the image should be: vehicles and buildings designed based on the original image; mascot costumes that are moderately exaggerated but inspired by the original image; and signs featuring the original image.  
The mascot costumes should incorporate elements from the original image but be slightly stylized to enhance realism.  
The sizes of characters and mascot costumes must be proportionate and realistic.  
Even if the original image has an anime style, the final generated image must depict a realistic theme park.  
Please strictly follow these guidelines.

title: 将漫画人物融入你的真人照片
author: @azed_ai
prompt: 一张东京拥挤地铁车厢的超写实照片。车厢里，一个疲惫的武士坐在一个二维黑白漫画人物上。人物线条干净利落，运用了交叉阴影技法。地铁车厢的灯光恰到好处地照射在二维画面上，在墨线处营造出逼真的高光。人物手中拿着一个真实的汽水罐，巧妙地将二维和三维世界融合在一起。4K分辨率，电影级构图。
prompt_en: A photograph of a crowded subway train in Tokyo, hyper-realistic style. Sitting on one of the seats is a 2D black-and-white manga illustration of a tired samurai. The character is drawn with clean ink lines and cross-hatching shading. The lighting from the subway car hits the 2D drawing correctly, creating realistic highlights on the ink. The character holds a real photographic soda can, blending the 2D and 3D worlds. 4k, cinematic composition.

title: Clothing laid out separately on a bed
author: 成阿ハルキ⭐👹
prompt: Give each piece of her clothing separately on the bed.
prompt_en: Give each piece of her clothing separately on the bed.

prompt_en: Show this man in the same fitness poses as in the first image, in a realistic style.

title: 自然素颜少女枕边自拍特写

title: 秋叶雕琢浪漫微景
author: 岚叔
prompt:
这是一幅超精细的数字绘画，描绘了一片完整的秋枫叶，悬挂在柔和的春日午后光线中。叶子通过激光切割技术精细地雕刻出一段精美的微观场景：一对情侣站在一棵盛开的樱花树下，花瓣在空中飘荡。切割出的部分揭示出一个充满梦幻感的、焦距较浅的花园背景，沐浴在金色的散射阳光下。  
在叶子的表面，透明的露珠像液态珍珠般闪闪发光——一滴完美的球形露珠附着在叶子边缘，捕捉到了整个场景的微型倒影；另一滴露珠在掉落过程中留下一道细腻的水痕。  
叶子具有丰富的三维质感：叶脉作为自然的轮廓，纸张般薄的切割部分产生了微妙的阴影，增强了场景的立体感。光照效果极具电影感——柔和、有方向性且温暖，为叶子的自然纹理勾勒出柔和的明暗层次。  
风格：融合了18世纪植物插画的精确度、当代的超现实主义以及电影静帧的美学风格（让人联想到吴宇森或索菲亚·科波拉的作品）。  
色彩搭配：琥珀红色、腮红粉色、奶油金色和柔和的绿色。  
氛围：温柔、短暂、诗意且充满浪漫气息。  
背景：樱花树沐浴在阳光中，春叶朦胧而模糊，地面被处理成一面反射性的镜面，与叶子和天空相呼应。构图居中，采用微距镜头视角，分辨率高达8K。
prompt_en:
宝玉这个太唯美了，忍不住想刻画两张
图一提示词：A hyper-detailed digital painting of a single, intact autumn maple leaf suspended in soft spring afternoon light. The leaf is intricately laser-cut with an exquisite micro-scene: a couple standing beneath a blooming cherry blossom tree, petals floating mid-air. The cut-out areas reveal a dreamy, shallow-depth-of-field garden background bathed in golden-hour diffused sunlight.
On the remaining leaf surface, translucent dewdrops glisten like liquid pearls— one perfectly spherical drop clings to the edge, capturing a miniature reflection of the entire scene; another trails a delicate, shimmering water streak as it begins to fall.
The leaf exhibits rich 3D texture: veins act as natural contours, and the paper-thin cutouts create subtle shadows that enhance depth. Lighting is cinematic—soft, directional, warm—casting gentle gradients across the leaf’s organic topography.
Style: fusion of 18th-century botanical illustration precision + contemporary hyperrealism + film still aesthetic (reminiscent of Wong Kar-wai or Sofia Coppola). Color palette: amber reds, blush pinks, creamy golds, and soft greens. Mood: tender, ephemeral, poetic, quietly romantic.
Background: bokeh of sun-dappled cherry trees and hazy spring foliage, ground rendered as a reflective water-mirror surface echoing the leaf and sky. Composition centered, macro lens perspective, ultra-high resolution, 8k.
图二提示词：
English Prompt (Optimized):
A hyper-detailed digital painting of a single, intact autumn maple leaf suspended in soft spring afternoon light. The leaf is intricately laser-cut with an exquisite micro-scene: the delicate facial profile of Audrey Hepburn—capturing her iconic arched eyebrows, almond eyes, refined nose, and gentle chin—but rendered entirely in harmonious autumnal tones that echo the leaf itself: warm amber reds for subtle contouring, blush pinks for her lips and cheeks, creamy golds for highlights on her skin, and faint olive-greens in the shadows to mirror the leaf’s organic undertones. Her upswept hair blends seamlessly into the leaf’s veins, as if grown from its fibers.
She stands beneath a blooming cherry blossom tree within the cut-out, petals floating mid-air around her. The negative space reveals a dreamy, shallow-depth-of-field garden background bathed in golden-hour diffused sunlight.
On the remaining leaf surface, translucent dewdrops glisten like liquid pearls—one perfectly spherical drop clings to the edge, capturing a miniature reflection of Hepburn’s face and the cherry blossoms; another trails a delicate, shimmering water streak as it begins to fall.
The leaf exhibits rich 3D texture: raised veins act as natural contours, and the paper-thin laser-cut areas cast soft, dimensional shadows that enhance depth. Lighting is cinematic—soft, directional, warm—casting luminous gradients across the leaf’s topography.
Style: fusion of 18th-century botanical illustration precision + contemporary hyperrealism + film still aesthetic (reminiscent of Wong Kar-wai’s color poetry or Sofia Coppola’s tender nostalgia).
Color palette: amber reds, blush pinks, creamy golds, soft mossy greens—no stark whites or cool tones.
Mood: tender, ephemeral, poetic, quietly romantic, steeped in wistful memory.
Background: bokeh of sun-dappled cherry trees and hazy spring foliage; ground rendered as a reflective water-mirror surface, softly echoing the leaf, sky, and Hepburn’s silhouette.
Composition: centered, macro lens perspective, ultra-high resolution, 8K.

title: 日系偶像风街头时尚写真
author: BeautyVerse

title: 极简卧室氛围大片
author: @xmiiru_
prompt:
{
  "prompt": "超现实现代室内自拍，以上传的图片为主要参考。保留参考图片中完全相同的面孔、身材、肤色和发型。温馨极简卧室内饰，柔和的紫色氛围 LED 灯光。穿着黑色紧身短上衣和黑色短裤。正面自拍角度，轻松自信的表情。背景中有一面大圆形镜子，从背后反射我的全身，同时手持智能手机。自然皮肤纹理，淡妆，真实比例。电影照明配柔和阴影，高细节，锐利焦点，Instagram 美学，4K 画质，照片级真实，现代生活摄影。",
  "negative_prompt": "换脸，不同人，解剖错误，多余肢体，多余手指，身体扭曲，不真实的比例，模糊，低质量，卡通，动漫，过度磨皮，塑料肌肤，刺眼灯光",
  "style": "超现实",
  "lighting": "电影柔和照明，紫色氛围 LED 光晕",
  "camera": "正面自拍，眼平角度",
  "environment": "极简温馨卧室，现代内饰",
  "quality": "4K，高细节，锐利焦点",
  "aspect_ratio": "1:1"
}
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "Ultra-realistic modern indoor selfie using my uploaded image as the main reference. Preserve the exact same face, body shape, skin tone, and hairstyle from the reference image. Cozy minimalist bedroom interior with soft purple ambient LED lighting. Wearing a black fitted top and black shorts. Front-facing selfie camera angle, relaxed and confident expression. A large round mirror in the background reflecting my full body from the back while holding a smartphone. Natural skin texture, subtle makeup, realistic proportions. Cinematic lighting with soft shadows, high detail, sharp focus, Instagram aesthetic, 4K quality, photorealistic, modern lifestyle photography.",

  "lighting": "cinematic soft lighting, purple ambient LED glow",
  "camera": "front selfie, eye-level angle",
  "environment": "minimalist cozy bedroom, modern interior",

  "aspect_ratio": "1:1"
}

title: 历史事件微缩场景生成器
author: TechieSA
prompt:
“呈现一个清晰的、45°自上而下的等轴测微型3D卡通场景，主题为历史事件‘[EVENT]’，重点展示其最具标志性的时刻：[描述内容]。使用柔和细腻的纹理、逼真的PBR材质以及自然生动的灯光效果。  
构建一个小型凸起式的立体模型底座，包含该时刻最具有辨识度的元素；如有需要，可添加风格化的微小角色（无需绘制面部细节）。  
背景颜色统一为干净的纯粹色调[BACKGROUND COLOR]。  
在画面顶部正中央以粗体大字显示‘[EVENT]’，下方用中等字号文字添加简短的描述性标题；标题下方再放置一个小型的官方标志或简化图标。  
所有文字的对比度需与背景保持一致（白色或黑色）。  
构图要求：元素布局绝对居中，画面尺寸为1080x1080像素，风格需简洁纯净、视觉效果高度清晰。”
prompt_en:
“Present a clear, 45° top-down isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene of the historical event “EVENT”, featuring its most iconic moment: [DESCRIPTION]. Use soft refined textures, realistic PBR materials, and gentle lifelike lighting.
Create a small raised diorama-style base that includes the most recognizable elements of this moment, along with tiny stylized characters if needed (no facial details).
Use a clean solid [BACKGROUND COLOR] background.
At the top-center, display “[EVENT]” in large bold text, directly beneath it show a short descriptive subtitle in medium text, and place a small official symbol or simplified icon below the subtitle.
All text must automatically match the background contrast (white or black).
Composition: perfectly centered layout, square 1080x1080, ultra-clean, high-clarity diorama aesthetic.”

title: 手绘笔记风格服装标注素描
author: Filschics
prompt: 画一张手绘草图，在笔记本纸上用线条、涂鸦和箭头标示出每件衣物。
prompt_en: create a sketch of a hand-drawn drawing with lines on notebook paper, doodles, and arrows identifying each item of clothing

title: 红裙女星闪耀闪光灯下的时尚大片
author: LOKII

title: 黑车花海中的时尚少女写真
author: Aditi Menon

title: 樱桃香水广告大片
author: @Naiknelofar788
prompt: 一张超写实的奢华香氛产品照片，一只深红色长方体玻璃瓶，瓶身标签[TOM FORD LOST CHERRY]，笔直竖立并居中放置在充满活力的绿色苔藓床上，场景设在茂密魔法森林环境，瓶底四周散落着光泽饱满的成熟樱桃，上方细枝上也悬挂着樱桃，温暖金色阳光从左上角斜射而下，营造强烈电影感背光、棱镜彩虹镜头光斑、柔和体积光束、漂浮尘埃粒子与淡淡雾光，拥有浓郁色彩对比、锐利玻璃反射、闪耀高光、浅景深、宏观产品清晰度、自然阴影与梦幻奇幻氛围，专为高端香氛广告设计
prompt_en: A hyper realistic luxury perfume product photo of a deep red rectangular glass bottle labeled [TOM FORD LOST CHERRY] standing upright and centered on a bed of vibrant green moss inside a dense enchanted forest environment with glossy ripe cherries scattered around the base and hanging from thin branches above while warm golden sunlight streams diagonally from the top left creating strong cinematic backlighting prismatic rainbow lens flares soft volumetric rays floating dust particles and a subtle mistglow with rich color contrast sharp glass refection glowing highlights shallow depth of field macro product.clarity natural shadows and a dreamy fantasy atmosphere designed for premium fragrance advertising

title: 四格动漫漫画，主角是熊猫女孩
author: しんもも🍑 | AIで創る循環の世界
prompt:
生成一个典型的日式动漫风格的四格漫画。图像是一个垂直的长方形，四格从上到下排列。

[角色设定]
* 姓名：Rookie* 种族：熊猫人（一个头上长着圆形熊猫耳朵的人类女孩）* 发型：银色双马尾

title: 奶油意面分层展示与动态旋转演示
author: 𝐌
prompt:
运动提示：意面杯开始缓慢旋转，配料轻柔而精确地分离，同时保持对齐和比例。运动流畅，无额外效果。

图片 1 - 超逼真的美食摄影，一份盛放在简约陶瓷碗中的奶油白酱通心粉。完美烹制的通心粉均匀裹上浓郁、有光泽的奶油酱，顶部撒上新鲜磨碎的帕玛森芝士和切碎的绿色香草。干净的白色影棚背景，柔和的漫射光，碗下有轻微阴影，酱汁上有自然高光，质感和浓稠度逼真。居中构图，浅景深，高级餐厅风格摆盘，高细节美食造型，8K 画质，锐利对焦，无文字，无标签，无手，无道具，无水印。

图片 2 - 奶油意面碗的分解图，以清晰的商业分解形式呈现。
恰好五种配料，垂直方向均匀间隔。
配料顺序（从上到下）：
磨碎的帕玛森芝士 — 20 克
新鲜香草装饰 — 5 克
奶油白酱 — 80 克
煮熟的通心粉 — 150 克
餐碗底座 — 200 克（底部）
简约信息图注释，教学式美食设计。
prompt_en:
Motion Prompt: The pasta Cup start to round spin while ingredients separate gently and precisely, maintaining alignment and scale. The motion is smooth, with no extra effects.

IMAGE 1 - Ultra-realistic food photography of a prepared creamy white sauce penne pasta served in a minimal ceramic bowl. Perfectly cooked penne coated evenly in rich, glossy cream sauce, topped with freshly grated parmesan cheese and finely chopped green herbs. Clean white studio background, soft diffused lighting, gentle shadows under the bowl, natural highlights on the sauce, realistic texture and thickness. Centered composition, shallow depth of field, premium restaurant-style presentation, high-detail food styling, 8K quality, sharp focus, no text, no labels, no hands, no props, no watermark.

IMAGE 2 - Exploded view of a creamy pasta bowl, presented as a clean commercial breakdown.
Exactly five ingredients, evenly spaced in vertical order.
Ingredient order (top → bottom):
Grated parmesan cheese — 20 g
Fresh herbs garnish — 5 g
Creamy white sauce — 80 g
Cooked penne pasta — 150 g
Serving bowl base — 200 g (bottom)
Minimal infographic annotations, instructional food design.

title: 夜店双姝写真生成器
author: BubbleBrain

title: 马赛克壁画
author: azed_ai
prompt: 这是一幅以[特定主题]为内容的马赛克壁画，由破碎的陶瓷碎片和玻璃碎片拼接而成，使用的是经太阳日晒褪色的[颜色1]和风化的[颜色2]作为装饰材料。壁画被嵌入到一块有裂纹的灰泥墙中，不规则的形状和接缝线营造出一种质朴而充满岁月痕迹的美感。
prompt_en: A mosaic mural of a [subject], crafted from chipped ceramic and glass shards in sun-faded [color1] and weathered [color2]. Set into a cracked plaster wall, the irregular shapes and grout lines add a rustic, timeworn charm.

title: 谷歌眼睛和棍子手
author: ﻿madpencil_
prompt: ﻿添加带有插图的粘性眼睛，并以夸张的喜剧姿势把手放在（物体/动物/你的bff）上
prompt_en: ﻿Add illustrated googly eyes and stick hands on the (object/animal/ your bff) in an exaggerated comedic pose

title: 复古暖调肖像：卷发青年坐姿写真，橄榄绿衬衫搭配深色裤装，柔和
author: Harboriis
prompt:
主体（人物）

请以参考照片中的人物作为主体。保持其面部特征、发型、肤色和表情完全不变，保留所有的真实感、情感深度和微妙的面部光线。只允许改变相机位置、背景运动和氛围。

场景与构图

垂直中景工作室肖像。人物坐在一张简单的木凳或金属凳上，身体略微侧转。双腿交叉，姿态放松而沉着；双手自然放置。整体氛围：安静、平静、克制。

服装

衬衫（外层）：宽松的衬衫，颜色为褪色橄榄绿、灰卡其色或水洗军绿色。柔软的棉质面料，袖子卷至小臂中部，带有自然的细微褶皱。T 恤（内层）：水洗炭灰色哑光 T 恤，无标志，在衬衫下略微合身。裤子：深炭灰色或水洗黑色的阔腿裤；哑光重磅棉或羊毛混纺面料，线条笔直，褶皱极少。配饰：无或极少——例如，一块简单的老式金属手表。

背景

厚重的哑光织物背景布（天鹅绒或厚棉布），颜色为深森林绿、暖橄榄绿或柔和军绿色。柔软垂坠，带有细微褶皱；边缘处有温暖的渐变效果。

灯光

温暖怀旧的工作室灯光（4500-5000K）。大型柔光箱提供环绕式照明。柔和的金色皮肤高光，提升阴影，营造哑光、低对比度的外观。脸颊和头发边缘有轻微的轮廓光；边缘有淡淡的渐晕效果。灵感来源于 70 年代至 90 年代初的工作室肖像。

相机/光学效果

85mm 复古人像镜头，f/2.8 景深。柔和的微对比度，轻微的光晕，极细的胶片颗粒，哑光暖色调配置文件。

色彩/风格

温暖怀旧的调色板，带有柔和的军事色调：金色皮肤、褪色橄榄绿、灰卡其色、炭灰色。哑光质感，提升黑色，压缩高光，微妙的有机胶片颗粒。整体：柔和温暖的胶片肖像，带有克制的战后美学，灵感来自柯达 Portra 胶片。
prompt_en:
MAIN SUBJECT (IDENTITY)

Use the person from the reference photo as the main subject. Keep their exact facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, and expression perfectly unchanged preserve all realism, emotional depth, and subtle facial lighting. Allow changes only in camera position, background motion, and atmosphere.

SCENE & COMPOSITION

Vertical medium-shot studio portrait. The man sits on a simple wooden or metal stool, gentle half-profile torso turn. One leg crossed over the other for a relaxed, composed posture; hands resting naturally. Overall mood: quiet, calm, restrained.

CLOTHING

Shirt (top layer): Oversized shirt in faded olive, dusty khaki, or washed military green. Soft textured cotton, sleeves rolled to mid-forearm, natural subtle wrinkles. T-shirt (underlayer): Washed charcoal matte tee, no logos, slightly fitted under the shirt. Trousers: Wide-leg trousers in deep charcoal or washed black; matte heavy-duty cotton or wool blend, straight lines, minimal folds. Accessories: None or very minimal-eg. simple old-style metal watch.

BACKGROUND

Heavy matte fabric backdrop (velvet or thick cotton) in deep forest green, warm olive, or muted army green. Soft draping with subtle folds; warm gradient fall-off toward the edges.

LIGHTING

Warm nostalgic studio lighting (4500-5000K). Large softbox for wraparound illumination. Soft golden skin highlights, lifted shadows for a matte non-contrasty look. Mild rim light along cheek and hair; faint vignette around edges. Mood inspired by 70s early 90s studio portraits.

CAMERA/OPTICAL LOOK

85mm vintage portrait lens, f/2.8 depth of field. Soft micro-contrast, slight halation, very fine film grain, matte warm-muted profile.

COLOR/STYLE

Warm nostalgic palette with muted military tones: golden skin, faded olive, dusty khaki, charcoal. Matte texture, lifted blacks, compressed highlights, subtle organic film grain. Overall: soft warm film portrait with restrained post-war aesthetic, Kodak Portra-inspired

title: 一张极具戏剧张力的黑白特写肖像
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: 一张极具戏剧张力的黑白特写肖像，展现了一位英俊的年轻东亚男性。他的头发微湿，凌乱地贴在额头和脸颊上，脸颊上挂着几颗水珠。他眼神迷离，嘴唇微张，表情中带着一丝脆弱和诱惑。他穿着一件被水浸湿的黑色T恤，贴合在肩膀上。强烈的侧光照亮了他脸上的水珠和湿润的皮肤，形成鲜明的高光，与深邃的阴影形成强烈对比。极简的深色背景，照片极具电影氛围，高细节，胶片颗粒感重，传达出一种神秘而充满张力的情绪。
prompt_en: A highly dramatic black and white close-up portrait depicting a handsome young East Asian man. His hair is slightly damp and tousled, clinging to his forehead and cheeks, with a few water droplets on his face. His gaze is dreamy and unfocused, lips slightly parted, conveying a sense of vulnerability and seduction. He wears a wet black T-shirt that fits snugly over his shoulders. Intense side lighting illuminates the water droplets and moist skin, creating bright highlights that contrast sharply with deep shadows. The minimalist dark background enhances the cinematic atmosphere. The image is highly detailed, with a strong film grain texture, evoking a mysterious and tense emotional mood.

title: 吉卜力风格插画：unyo303的奇幻工作室场景
author: unyo303
prompt: 请广泛收集关于“{"person name" "unyo303"}”这个人的国内外信息。根据这些信息，推断此人的性格、背景和世界观，并以吉卜力工作室的绘画风格，创作一个适合在社交媒体上使用的方形图标图像。
prompt_en: “うにょ303”及び、“unyo303”という人物について国内外から幅広く情報を集め、その情報から、この人物像や背景、この自分が持つ世界観を導き出して、SNS等で使用出来るような正方形のアイコン画像を、スタジオジブリ風の作画で画像を作成して下さい。

title: 熊遇险自救指南
author: 赤川 彰 | 上級ウェブ解析士×上級SNSマネージャー
prompt: 请创建插图，展示如何保护自己免受熊的侵害。插图中的人物应为日本人。请提供日文说明。
prompt_en: 熊から身を守る手順をイラストでつくってください。 イラストに登場する人間は日本人。説明は日本語でお願いします。

title: 老照片高清修复
author: @ShreyaYadav___
prompt: 上传图片的高级人像，100% 还原本人面部特征。明亮清晰的曝光，柔和的影棚灯光，亮度均衡，面部和眼部高光自然，阴影过渡平滑。肌肤纹理极其逼真，双眼细节清晰锐利，发丝自然，织物细节丰富。背景干净优雅，景深柔和。采用高级电影级调色，色彩饱满自然。全画幅单反风格，85mm f/1.8 镜头，8K 超高清画质，无卡通化、无过度磨皮、无面部修改。
prompt_en: Luxury portrait of the uploaded image, 100% same face identity. Bright, clean exposure with soft studio lighting, balanced brightness, natural highlights on face and eyes, smooth shadow falloff. Ultra-realistic skin texture, sharp detailed eyes, natural hair strands, high-detail fabric. Clean elegant background with soft depth of field. Premium cinematic color grading, rich natural colors. Full-frame DSLR look, 85mm f/1.8, 8K ultra-realistic, no cartoon, no over-smoothing, no face change.

title: 现实崩塌中的孤勇前行
author: Saul Goodman
prompt: 一个孤独的人影在前进，而他们周围的世界正违背着所有的物理定律：城市宛如融化的钢铁般弯曲扭曲，重力似乎向侧面坍塌，建筑物裂开，露出散发着红光的能量裂缝，玻璃碎片在空气中缓缓飘动……
prompt_en: A lone human silhouette walking forward as the world around them breaks all physical laws — a city bending and twisting like melted steel, gravity collapsing sideways, buildings splitting open into glowing red cracks of energy, shards of glass floating in slow motio

title: 面包形态
author: azed_ai
prompt: 这是一件极其逼真的雕塑作品，完全由某种面包材料制成，细节和色彩都做得非常精细。雕塑表面呈现出面包的自然特征：金棕色、有光泽、易碎或形成硬壳质地；在适当的位置还可见到面包的层次结构或内部结构（如种子）。雕塑采用工作室灯光进行渲染，整体效果柔和自然。
prompt_en: A highly realistic sculpture of a [object], made entirely from [bread type] with ultra-detailed texture and color. The surface shows the natural properties of the bread, golden-brown, glossy, flaky or crusty, with visible layers or seeds where appropriate, studio lighting, soft

title: 真人与壁画肖像合影
author: D. Humann
prompt:
创作一张高分辨率的影棚照片，以 THE_SUBJECT 为主体，并严格参照上传的照片来确保身份的视觉一致性。THE_SUBJECT 的面部特征、肤色、身体比例、发型、面部毛发和整体外貌必须与参考图像完全匹配，不得有任何重新诠释或风格化处理。

THE_SUBJECT 自然随意地站立，靠在一面素色的混凝土或石膏影棚墙壁上。THE_SUBJECT 被拍摄成一个真实的人在真实的影棚环境中——这是一张摄影图像，而非插画。

在 THE_SUBJECT 身后的墙壁上，直接绘制着一幅大型壁画，描绘了 THE_SUBJECT 的面部和上半身。这幅壁画是 THE_SUBJECT 的风格化矢量艺术肖像，清晰可辨是同一个人，以大胆的图形形状、干净的边缘和现代插画的色块渲染而成。壁画的尺寸远超真人大小，占据了墙壁的大部分表面。

THE_SUBJECT 的真实身体部分重叠并遮挡了壁画，增强了深度和比例感，同时仍然能立即清楚地表明壁画代表的是 THE_SUBJECT。壁画必须清晰地显示为绘制在墙上，而不是漂浮、投影或数字叠加。

灯光是受控的影棚灯光，具有电影般的质感：柔和但有方向性，均匀地照亮 THE_SUBJECT 和壁画，带有微妙的对比度和色彩分离，使真实的主体和绘制的壁画能够清晰地共存于同一物理空间中。

最终图像应呈现出一种专业影棚肖像的感觉，仿佛是在定制壁画墙前拍摄的——真实、扎实、视觉上连贯——真实人物主体与身后风格化的绘制肖像之间有清晰的区别。
prompt_en:
Create a high-resolution studio photograph featuring THE_SUBJECT, using the uploaded photo as a strict visual reference for identity. THE_SUBJECT’s facial features, skin tone, body proportions, hairstyle, facial hair, and overall appearance must match the reference image exactly, with no reinterpretation or stylization of THE_SUBJECT. 

THE_SUBJECT is standing naturally and casually, leaning against a plain concrete or plaster studio wall. THE_SUBJECT is photographed as a real person in a real studio environment — this is a photographic image, not an illustration.

Painted directly onto the wall behind THE_SUBJECT is a large-scale mural depicting THE_SUBJECT’s face and upper body. The mural is a stylized vector-art portrait of THE_SUBJECT, clearly recognizable as the same person, rendered in bold graphic shapes, clean edges, and modern illustrative color blocking. The mural is significantly larger than life-size and occupies most of the wall surface.

THE_SUBJECT’s real body partially overlaps and obscures the mural, reinforcing depth and scale, while still making it immediately clear that the mural represents THE_SUBJECT. The mural must remain visibly painted on the wall, not floating, not projected, and not a digital overlay.

Lighting is controlled studio lighting with a cinematic feel: soft but directional, illuminating both THE_SUBJECT and the mural evenly, with subtle contrast and color separation that allows the real subject and the painted mural to coexist clearly in the same physical space.

The final image should feel like a professional studio portrait photographed in front of a custom mural wall — realistic, grounded, and visually cohesive — with a clear distinction between the real human subject and the stylized painted portrait behind them.

title: 纳米香蕉Pro震撼登场
author: Linus ✦ Ekenstam
prompt: 为这个 {"structure_en" "桑拿房"} 创建一份建造蓝图。
prompt_en: Create a builders blue print for this {"structure" "sauna"}

title: 定制卡通钥匙扣设计
author: Amira Zairi
prompt: 一张特写照片，展示了一个人手中拿着的可爱彩色钥匙扣。钥匙扣采用 Q 版造型，图案为[附图]。钥匙扣由柔软的橡胶制成，带有醒目的黑色轮廓线，并配有一个小巧的银色钥匙圈，背景为中性色。
prompt_en:
Another great project idea using GPT-4o: customized Keychains 😍🔥
What do you think? Would you buy one of these?
Prompt 👇 https://t.co/NLAhuNuAZ5

title: 乐高糖果奇幻世界冒险场景

title: 真实世界的AR信息化
author: @bilawalsidhu
prompt: 你是一个基于位置的AR体验生成器。在这张图像中突出显示[兴趣点]并标注相关信息

title: 美食广告摄影风格预设
author: Aleena Amir
prompt: 完美摆盘的 {"food item" "[FOOD]"} 居中于画面，生食配料围绕其旋转，香草、香料和酱汁漂浮在半空中，营造出一种受控的混乱感，工作室灯光带来柔和高光，深色背景，现代美食广告摄影风格，超细节，超真实。
prompt_en: Perfectly styled {"food item" "[FOOD]"} centered in frame with raw ingredients orbiting around it, herbs, spices, and sauces floating mid-air, controlled chaos, studio lighting with soft highlights, dark background, modern food ad photography, hyper-detailed, ultra-real

title: 超现实主义蒸汽波
author: @LudovicCreator
prompt: [主题] 在超现实主义蒸汽波拼贴画中。结合古典雕塑、80 年代复古未来主义和日本城市景观的元素。使用 [COLOR1] 和 [COLOR2] 的柔和色调，并带有淡淡的霓虹灯
prompt_en: [Theme] In a surrealist vaporwave collage. Incorporate elements of classical sculpture, 1980s retro-futurism, and Japanese cityscapes. Use soft tones of [COLOR1] and [COLOR2], with subtle neon lighting.

title: Ad manga for a radio show with a gorilla and rabbit
author: 少し明るい高橋くん
prompt: Use the attached images of the gorilla and the rabbit. Create an advertisement manga for the radio program “Genki no Deru Radio,” where the gorilla and rabbit are the personalities. It airs every Wednesday at 10:15 p.m. on X Spaces. One-page manga, in color, with sound effect text included.
prompt_en: Use the attached images of the gorilla and the rabbit. Create an advertisement manga for the radio program “Genki no Deru Radio,” where the gorilla and rabbit are the personalities. It airs every Wednesday at 10:15 p.m. on X Spaces. One-page manga, in color, with sound effect text included.

title: 动漫与现实分割肖像
author: @_MehdiSharifi_
prompt: 一张16:9的电影式宽屏镜头，画面中央是漩涡鸣人的头像，脸部被垂直分割成两半。一条清晰的黑线将两种不同的画风从中间分开。[左半边]：经典的动漫风格，亮金色的刺猬头，蓝色的动漫眼睛，黑色的胡须印记，带有粗线条的金属头箍。[右半边]：写实风格，逼真的脏金色纹理头发，锐利的蓝色眼睛，胡须印记如同淡淡的疤痕，头箍上带有锈迹的金属质感。头箍和面部特征完美契合，构成一幅浑然一体的角色肖像，使用虚幻引擎5渲染而成。
prompt_en: A cinematic 16:9 wide shot featuring a single centered headshot of Naruto Uzumaki, face split vertically in half. A distinct black line separates the two art styles down the center. [LEFT HALF]: Classic anime style, bright blonde spiky hair, blue anime eye, black whisker marks, metal headband with bold lines. [RIGHT HALF]: Gritty realism, realistic dirty blonde textured hair, piercing blue human eye, whisker marks as faint scars, weathered metal texture on the headband with rust. The headband and facial features align perfectly to form a single, unified character portrait, rendered in Unreal Engine 5.

title: 夜幕降临：炼狱——一场发生在机场的激烈战斗……
author: lexx_aura

title: 赛博朋克雨夜街头朋克少女写真
author: Oogie
prompt: 一张原始、坦率的街头风格照片，参考人物跑过被雨水浸湿的新东京小巷，回头一瞥。仅使用上传的自拍作为面部参考。她身穿一件超大号的“{"jacket color" "深红色"}”做旧牛仔夹克，上面别着安全别针和补丁。里面是一件破旧的乐队 T 恤。雨滴落在相机镜头上，形成了自然的畸变。背景是模糊的红色霓虹灯，倒映在湿漉漉的柏油路上。图像经过大量处理，并带有故障伪影。风格：闪光摄影、高对比度、肾上腺素飙升。
prompt_en: A raw, candid street-style shot of reference running through a rain-soaked Neo-Tokyo alleyway, glancing over her shoulder. Use uploaded selfie as ONLY face reference. She is wearing an oversized "{"jacket color" "Crimson Red"}" distressed denim jacket with safety pins and patches. Underneath, a torn band tee. Raindrops on the camera lens create natural distortion. The background is blurred red neon signs reflecting on wet asphalt. The image is heavily processed and glitch artifacts. Style: Flash photography, high contrast, adrenaline rush.

title: 在那个反乌托邦的夜晚中……一位“黑暗骑士”。
author: lexx_aura
